info.description: Bordered price box with a small label, italic price, and a note. Used on pay-what-you-feel sales pages (REGULATED) above the buy button.

label.description: Small uppercase label at the top of the box.

price.description: Italic price line. Example: 'from £5', '£90', 'Free to start'.

note.description: Small note under the price. Example: 'You choose what feels right. Full details at checkout.'

style.description: Optional background colour, padding for the section around the box.
